highlights.summary:
AllNighters Victorious Over Franchise
AllNighters defeated Franchise 9-5 on Monday.

AllNighters jumped out to the lead in the bottom of the first inning after Brendan “Btro” Trohon singled, scoring one run, Joe Zametjis homered, scoring three runs, and Darren “Dermbo” McDermott singled, scoring one run.
A single by Brendan “Bmac” McCarthy, a single by Trohon, and a double by Jason Farrell helped AllNighters extend their early lead in the second.
Mike “The OG” Russo earned the win for AllNighters. The starting pitcher gave up seven hits and five runs (one earned) over seven innings, striking out none and walking none.
AllNighters collected 14 hits in the game. Patrick Hosman, McCarthy, Eric “E” Moody, and Trohon each collected two hits for AllNighters. Zametjis led AllNighters with three runs batted in. The left-handed hitter went 1-for-3 on the day.
